summary: 2026-07-04 07:32:52 PDT - Reviewed `git log --oneline main..HEAD`, `git diff main...HEAD`, and `reviews/save-attendee-and-name.md`. The branch stays within the approved file scope, mock-gates the presenter name field, implements explicit direct/alias saved-list membership via a pure helper, and wires Save to `addRule(target.name, target.rate)` plus `clearOverride(p.id)` as specified. Focused Vitest execution was attempted but blocked by the read-only sandbox when Vite tried to write `.vite-temp`; no code issue found.
